sn38.4:1.1: "Kimatthiyaṁ, āvuso sāriputta, samaṇe gotame brahmacariyaṁ vussatī"ti?
sn38.4:1.2: "Dukkhassa kho, āvuso, pariññātthaṁ bhagavati brahmacariyaṁ vussatī"ti. "Atthi panāvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā etassa dukkhassa pariññāyā"ti?
sn38.4:1.3: "Atthi kho, āvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā, etassa dukkhassa pariññāyā"ti? "Katamo panāvuso, maggo katamā paṭipadā, etassa dukkhassa pariññāyā"ti?
sn38.4:2.2:
"Ayameva kho, āvuso, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo, etassa dukkhassa pariññāya, seyyathidaṁ – sammādiṭṭhi … pe … sammāsamādhi. Ayaṁ kho, āvuso, maggo ayaṁ paṭipadā etassa dukkhassa pariññāyā"ti. "Bhaddako, āvuso, maggo bhaddikā paṭipadā, etassa dukkhassa pariññāya. Alañca panāvuso sāriputta, appamādāyā"ti.
Catutthaṁ.
